name: Круг Мутации
description: Druids of the Circle of Mutation believe that nature should be improved in order to compete with the unnatural world. Their order hides in the darkest corners of swamps and forests, conducting experiments to warp the structure of their domain. They go unheard for months, emerging from the wilds with twisted vines and mutated creatures at their side. These Druids have earned the scorn of other circles, discredited as those who have lost their way. In the eyes of these Druids, those who wish to preserve nature as it is simply fear what change brings.

features.name: Circle Forms
features.description: You channel the endless possibilities of nature when you assume a Wild Shape form, granting you the benefits below. {@b Challenge Rating.} The maximum {@variantrule Challenge Rating|XPHB} for the form equals your Druid level divided by 3 (rounded down). {@b Predator's Strike.} When you hit with an attack roll using a Beast form's attack in Wild Shape, you add +2 to the damage dealt. {@b Unpredictable.} You can take the {@action Dash|XPHB}, {@action Disengage|XPHB}, or {@action Influence|XPHB} action as a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}.

features.name: Mutate Shape
features.description: When you assume a Wild Shape form, or as a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB} while your Wild Shape is active, you can expend a spell slot to gain Mutation Points equal to the slot's level. These Mutation Points last until they are spent, you gain additional Mutation Points, or you leave the form. While you have Mutation Points, you can spend them on your turn (no action required by you) to gain a Mutation from the list below. When you do, your body distends and reconstitutes in a gruesome display. Mutations last until you leave the form or you expend a spell slot to gain Mutation Points.

details.mutationOptions: The following options are available to your Mutate Shape feature. The options are presented in alphabetical order.
details.creatureOfTheSea: {@b Creature of the Sea.} Cost: 1 Mutation Point. You gain a {@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB} equal to your {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}, and you can breathe underwater. For an additional 1 Mutation Point, you gain a {@variantrule Swim Speed|XPHB} equal to twice your speed.
details.creatureOfTheSky: {@b Creature of the Sky.} Cost: 3 Mutation Points. You gain a {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} of 30 feet. For an additional 2 Mutation Points, your {@variantrule Fly Speed|XPHB} increases to 60 feet.
details.darkvision: {@b Darkvision.} Cost: 1 Mutation Point. You gain {@sense Darkvision} with a range of 60 feet. If you already have {@sense Darkvision}, its range increases by 60 feet.
details.disquietingVoice: {@b Disquieting Voice.} Cost: 1 Mutation Point. You can comprehend and verbally communicate with Beasts, and you can use any of the {@action Influence|XPHB} action's skill options with them.
details.echolocation: {@b Echolocation.} Cost: 3 Mutation Points. You have {@sense Blindsight} with a range of 30 feet while you don't have the {@condition Deafened} condition.
details.enlarge: {@b Enlarge.} Cost: 2 Mutation Points. Your size increases by one category (from Medium to Large, for example). You can spend an additional 2 Mutation Points to increase your size by two categories instead (from Medium to Huge, for example), gaining the benefits of the spell again. See the {@spell Enlarge/Reduce} spell to determine the benefits gained from this ability.
details.manipulateObjects: {@b Manipulate Objects.} Cost: 1 Mutation Point. As a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can take the {@action Utilize|XPHB} action.
details.multiattack: {@b Multiattack.} Cost: 2 Mutation Points. You can attack twice with a Wild Shape form's attack instead of once whenever you take the {@action Attack|XPHB} action on your turn.
details.naturalArmor: {@b Natural Armor.} Cost: 2 Mutation Points. You gain a +1 bonus to {@variantrule Armor Class|XPHB}. {@b Repeatable.} You can gain this Mutation more than once, but no more than three times.
details.reduce: {@b Reduce.} Cost: 1 Mutation Point. Your size decreases by one category (from Medium to Small, for example). You can spend an additional 2 Mutation Points to decrease your size by two categories instead (from Medium to Tiny, for example). See the {@spell Enlarge/Reduce} spell to determine the benefits gained from this ability.
details.venomousAttacks: {@b Venomous Attacks.} Cost: 2 Mutation Points. Once per turn, a creature you hit with a Wild Shape form's attack takes an extra {@dice 2d6} Poison damage, and you can force a creature you hit with a Wild Shape form's attack to make a Constitution saving throw against your spell save DC. On a failed save, the creature is {@condition Poisoned} for 1 minute. It can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the {@condition Poisoned} condition on a success. {@b Repeatable.} You can gain this Mutation more than once, but no more than three times. For each additional 2 Mutation points, the attack does an additional {@dice 2d6} Poison damage.
details.wallCrawler: {@b Wall Crawler.} Cost: 1 Mutation Point. You gain a {@variantrule Climb Speed|XPHB} equal to your speed. For an additional 1 Mutation Point, you gain a {@variantrule Climb Speed|XPHB} equal to twice your {@variantrule Speed|XPHB}.

features.name: Adaptive Physiology
features.description: Your mutations become more stable. When you use your Mutate Shape feature, you can choose one Mutation you currently have that costs 2 or fewer Mutation Points. That Mutation doesn't count against your Mutation Points. Additionally, you gain resistance to Poison damage.

features.name: Apex Predator
features.description: Your Wild Shape forms become even more terrifying. While in a Wild Shape form with active Mutations, you gain the following benefits: Your attacks in Wild Shape form count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity. When you take the Attack action and hit with a Wild Shape form's attack, you can make one additional attack as part of the same action. You have advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

features.name: Perfect Organism
features.description: You have achieved the pinnacle of adaptive evolution. When you assume a Wild Shape form, you gain 3 Mutation Points without expending a spell slot. Additionally, while you have any Mutations active, you have resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage, and you can maintain {@status Concentration} on spells while in Wild Shape form.
